mapper.select: /* SQL ID : TermLinkMgrDAO.select 설 명 : 학사연동 관리 조회 */ SELECT DATA_LNKG_ID AS termLinkMgrId , AUTO_DATA_LNKGYN AS autoLinkYn , LST_DATA_LNKG_DTTM AS lastLinkDttm , RGTR_ID AS rgtrId , FRST_INQ_DTTM AS regDttm , MDFR_ID AS mdfrId , MOD_DTTM AS modDttm FROM TB_LMS_AIS_SMSTR_DATA_LNKG WHERE DATA_LNKG_ID = 'LMGR_00000000000000000001'
